outputs.description: Connection status Tufin.AppConnections.Source.ID Connection source ID

outputs.description: Connection destination ID Tufin.AppConnections.Destination.Type Connection destination type

outputs.description: Connection service name Tufin.AppConnections.Comment Connection comment
